scene:coordinate_locus_candidate_scene.object_description: a coordinate grid with one shaded locus region and lettered candidate points
scene:coordinate_locus_candidate_scene.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected candidate letter as a capital letter
scene:coordinate_locus_candidate_scene.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the pixel point [x,y] at the center of the selected candidate point

scene:coordinate_locus_panel_grid_scene.object_description: labeled coordinate panels with shaded locus regions and a condition box
scene:coordinate_locus_panel_grid_scene.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected panel label as a capital letter
scene:coordinate_locus_panel_grid_scene.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the selected panel
